featuredWork.title: Featured Work
featuredWork.subtitle: Real problems solved with measurable results

projects.title: Hospital Innovation Mobile App
projects.problem: Hospital staff needed a digital solution to manage and automate equipment cleaning workflows
projects.solution: Built a cross-platform mobile app with React Native and TypeScript, backed by a Node.js REST API and MySQL database, deployed on AWS
projects.outcome: Digitized equipment cleaning operations, reducing manual tracking effort and improving compliance workflows

projects.title: IoT Weight Monitoring System
projects.problem: Industrial client needed automated, real-time inventory control for refrigerated stock via sensor data
projects.solution: Designed and built IoT devices (component selection, soldering, C++ firmware) with MQTT/HTTP M2M communication and Python automation integrated with an AWS backend
projects.outcome: Replaced manual stock counting with continuous real-time monitoring, enabling Industry 4.0 logistics automation

projects.title: Fullstack Web Platform
projects.problem: Client required a production-ready web platform with secure API integrations and cloud deployment
projects.solution: Developed a fullstack application with Next.js on the frontend and Node.js REST APIs connected to MySQL, secured with HTTPS and deployed via AWS
projects.outcome: Production platform live on the cloud with version-controlled deployments, reliable API communication, and a maintainable codebase
